title: Spotlight on ServiceNow: The "AI Control Tower" Playing Offense on "Tippy Toes"
description:
CEO Bill McDermott argues that while generative AI is "probabilistic" (random), enterprise operations must be "deterministic" (predictable)—and ServiceNow is the platform bridging that gap. This episode explores how the company is positioning itself not as an AI victim, but as the "AI Control Tower" for the Global 2000.
We dive into their strategy to consolidate the enterprise stack using "agentic workflows" that allow CIOs to deploy "kill switches" on rogue AI agents. You’ll hear how they are i

title: ServiceNow Q4 2025: "Playing Offense on Our Tippy Toes" & The $600M AI Reality Check
description:
Episode Summary: In this episode of The Odd Couple, we dissect ServiceNow’s massive Q4 2025 earnings. CEO Bill McDermott claims the company is "playing offense on our tippy toes" as they race toward a trillion-dollar valuation. But is the hype backed by hard cash, or just executive adrenaline?

• The AI Money is Real: "Now Assist" ACV hit $600 million, doubling year-over-year.

title: ServiceNow Chairman & CEO Bill McDermott Talks Earnings, AI
description:
ServiceNow Inc. CEO Bill McDermott discusses earnings, AI, regulations and says artificial intelligence is helping save on labor costs and making the company faster. “We’re slowing down the hiring in jobs that are — quite frankly — soul crushing jobs," McDermott said to Bloomberg's Caroline Hyde.
